description_long: This object consists of three small, cylindrical snack containers, each with a different colored lid: green, blue, and pink. The containers are transparent, revealing a white substance inside, likely yogurt or a similar dairy snack. Each lid is flat and slightly raised, fitting snugly onto the container, and the containers are stackable, as seen in the vertical arrangement. The front of each container displays a label with a brand logo and some text, with the color of the lid matching the accent color on the label. The containers are made of clear plastic with colored plastic lids, and each has a small rectangular tag or label attached to the side. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and suitable for individual snack servings in urban environments.
description: A set of three transparent snack containers with green, blue, and pink lids, each showing a white snack inside and a matching label on the front.
description_view_0: Three snack containers are stacked vertically, showing the colored lids (pink, blue, green) and front labels clearly.
description_view_1: The containers are arranged side by side, displaying the front labels and colored lids (green, blue, pink) with attached side tags.
description_view_2: The containers are stacked vertically from the back, showing the plain colored lids (green, blue, pink) without visible labels.
description_view_3: The containers are side by side from the back, showing the colored lids and the attached side tags, but no front labels.
attribute_brand_logo: A circular brand logo is visible on the front of each container, located centrally on the label, with black and white as dominant colors.
attribute_flavor_indication: Each container has a colored lid and matching label accent (green, blue, pink), but no explicit flavor text or graphics are visible.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A small rectangular tag or label is attached to the side of each container, possibly containing nutritional information, but the content is not clearly readable.
